name: Furious Tribes
background: The Guilds of the Nexus are various factions of violent and deranged outlaws that wage eternal guild wars on the streets of the Nexus. These guilds are joined by mercenaries which are not bound to any particular guild, and which fight for anyone that can provide riches or a worthy cause.

spells.name: Tribal Boost
spells.effect: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Savage Boost once (next time the effect would apply).

parameters.name: effectDuration
parameters.value: once (next time the effect would apply)

costFormula.value: { name: params.effect.unitRule.name, rating: params.effect.unitRule.rating, multiplier: params.multiplier * (params.aura ? this.AuraSize : 1), avgUnit: !params.thisUnit }

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick one friendly unit within 12", which gets Savage Boost once (next time the effect would apply).

spells.name: Rip!
spells.effect: Pick one enemy unit within 12", which takes 2 hits with AP(1) and Surge. Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

parameters.name: spellHitRoll
parameters.value: Roll as many dice as hits to see if "on rolls of 6" effects trigger.

costFormula.value: params.thisUnit ? 0 : this.getUnitBaseCostDiff({ quality: 4, defense: 5, tough: 2, rules: ["Tough"] }, { defense: 5 - params.effect.rollModifier.value })

effectDuration.name: once (next time the effect would apply)

spells.effectSkirmish: Pick up to three enemy units within 6", which takes 1 hits with AP(2) and Impale.

specialRules.name: Counter-Attack
specialRules.description: Strikes first when charged.

specialRules.name: Takedown Strike
specialRules.description: Once per game, when this model attacks in melee, you may pick one model in the unit as its target, and make one attack at Quality 2+ with AP(2) and Deadly(3), which is resolved as if it's a unit of 1.

specialRules.name: Repel Ambushers
specialRules.description: Enemy units using Ambush must be set up over 12" away from this model's unit.

specialRules.name: Re-Deployment
specialRules.description: After all other units are deployed (including non-Ambush units that were set aside), you may remove up to two friendly units from the table and deploy them again. Players alternate in placing Re-Deployment units, starting with the player that activates next.

specialRules.name: Precision Fighter Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get +1 to hit rolls in melee. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Savage
specialRules.description: When attacking, unmodified results of 6 to hit deal 1 extra hit (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Savage Boost Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Savage Boost. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Melee Evasion
specialRules.description: Enemies get -1 to hit rolls in melee when attacking units where all models have this rule.

specialRules.name: Quick Shot Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Quick Shot. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Speed Feat Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Speed Feat. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Melee Evasion Aura
specialRules.description: This model and up to 3 nearest friendly units picked before the start of the game get Melee Evasion. If this model is killed, picked models that are deployed lose the rule.

specialRules.name: Bounding
specialRules.description: When this unit is activated, you may place all models with this rule in it anywhere fully within D3+1" of their position.

specialRules.name: Impale
specialRules.description: Against non-Hero units with Tough(3) or more, this weapon gets Deadly(+3).

specialRules.name: Piercing Shooting Mark
specialRules.description: Once per activation, before attacking, pick up to 4 enemy units within 18", which friendly units gets AP(+1) when shooting against once (next time the effect would apply).

specialRules.name: Deadly
specialRules.description: Assign each wound to one model, and multiply it by X. Hits from Deadly must be resolved first, and these wounds don’t carry over to other models if the original target is killed.

specialRules.name: AP
specialRules.description: Targets get -X to Defense rolls when blocking hits.

specialRules.name: Ambush
specialRules.description: Only deploys D3 rounds afters its wave is deployed, and at the start of the round it's placed at the centre of a random table quarter.

specialRules.name: Savage Boost
specialRules.description: Models with Savage in this unit deal extra hits on successful hit results of 5-6 from Savage (instead of only on 6).

specialRules.name: Quick
specialRules.description: Moves +2" when using Advance, and +2” when using Rush/Charge.

specialRules.name: Quick Shot
specialRules.description: This model may shoot after using Rush actions.

specialRules.name: Speed Feat
specialRules.description: Once per game, when this unit moves and all its models have this rule, you may use this rule so that they move +3" when using Advance actions and +6" when using Rush/Charge actions.

specialRules.name: Tough
specialRules.description: Once a model has taken as many wounds as its Tough value, it is killed (remove from play).

specialRules.name: Surge
specialRules.description: On unmodified results of 6 to hit, this weapon deals 1 extra hits (only the original hit counts as a 6 for special rules).

specialRules.name: Blast
specialRules.description: Ignores cover, and after resolving other special rules, each hit is multiplied by X, where X is up to as many hits as enemy models in the target unit and within 3” of it. Hits must be split evenly between all enemy units within 3” of any model from the target (players pick how).
